paragraphs: When analyzing what crops are planted in what area by agricultural practice, according to the National Agriculture Census results, out of 7,222 total agricultural families in this sub-metropolitan city, 7,054 families are engaged in agricultural practices on cultivable land, with a total area of 4,044.0 hectares, which is 91.17%.

Out of the total area, 4,023.8 hectares (90.72%) are under temporary crops by all 7,054 families. Likewise, 100 agricultural families have 20.2 hectares (0.46%) under other cultivable land. Furthermore, 640 agricultural families use 57.9 hectares (2.19%) for permanent crops. Similarly, the area of permanent pastures, private open spaces, ponds, and other land is 294.4 hectares (6.64%).

table.title: Table No. 54: Details Regarding agricultural Land Use

headers.text: Total Area of Land Used by Agricultural Families
